examples: This use of dialogue underscores not only the dizzy quality of the character played by Katherine Hepburn, but also the absurdity of the film itself and thus its humor.
It was only later that she could see the absurdity of the situation.
His works on the absurdity and sufferings of life create the most comprehensive irony.
But, contrasting the hilarity and absurdity of Festivus, there is some logic to be gleaned from Takanakuy.
Hence the absurdity of money being funnelled into quasi-partisan groups like the Swift Boat Veterans.
